channel.title: Reviews in Chemical Engineering
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Reviews in Chemical Engineering

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Minyi Liu, Xintong You, Ying Li, Yi Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revce-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: Solid biomass chain from production to utilization in UK

item.title: A systematic review on the application of machine learning in carbon dioxide absorption in amine-related solvents
item.description: Article by Minyi Liu, Xintong You, Ying Li, Yi Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revce-2024-0047

item.title: Critical review on development of methylene blue degradation by wet catalytic methods
item.description: Article by Minyi Liu, Xintong You, Ying Li, Yi Yang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revce-2024-0054
